rules.title: Suspicious LDAP-Attributes Used
rules.description: Detects the usage of particular AttributeLDAPDisplayNames, which are known for data exchange via LDAP by the tool LDAPFragger and are additionally not commonly used in companies.

rules.title: ADSI-Cache File Creation By Uncommon Tool
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_* excluding 1 of filter_optional_*
rules.description: Detects the creation of an "Active Directory Schema Cache File" (.sch) file by an uncommon tool.
